title: Wu Phase Record
description: Status record for a single phase within a wu cycle, stored in .wu/phases/

ordinal.description: Execution order of this phase within the cycle

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the phase began, null if not yet started

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the phase finished, null if not yet completed

verdict.description: Phase-specific verdict payload, null if phase has no verdict yet

model_override.description: Model tier override for this phase, null to use default
